task: place the milk dairy in the blue bowl
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container is on a wooden table. A small blue object (likely the "milk dairy") is on the table near the container. The container has a flat base and an open top. STRATEGY - First, reach for and grasp the small blue object. Then, transport it to the blue container. Finally, place it inside the container. Failure modes include dropping the object during transport or misplacing it outside the container. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the small blue object on the table. Step 2: Grasp the object by its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the object to the open top of the blue container. Step 4: Place the object inside the container.
Goal: inside(milk_dairy, blue_container)
Scene: blue_container, milk_dairy, table
Step 1: reach(milk_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the small blue object
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, milk_dairy, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, milk_dairy) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(milk_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the small blue object
  contact: holding(milk_dairy) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(milk_dairy)
Step 3: transport(milk_dairy -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the open top of the blue container
  spatial: above(milk_dairy, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(milk_dairy)
  done_when: above(milk_dairy, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(milk_dairy -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the open top of the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(milk_dairy, blue_container) [completion]; released(milk_dairy) [completion]
  pose: inside(milk_dairy, blue_container) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(milk_dairy, blue_container) AND released(milk_dairy)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the small blue object
the body of the small blue object
the open top of the blue container
the open top of the blue container
